$schema_note: Pass-2 harvest by MisconceptionAnalyst from common_miss in data/buckets/verb_form.trapassato_prossimo.json. PENDING ratification. Uses families ratified in thread v2; new specifics defined here, reused ones under reuses_existing. Thread: inter_chat/Architecture_MisconceptionAnalyst_registry_harvest.md.

proposed_family_actions.note: Wrong TENSE of the auxiliary (vs the essere/avere choice). Confirms auxiliary_choice covers auxiliary-form errors, not only essere-vs-avere (v3 decision E).

proposed_misconceptions.proposed_label: Wrong tense of the auxiliary in a compound tense
proposed_misconceptions.proposed_description: Using the wrong tense of the (correct) auxiliary: the present 'ho/sono' where the trapassato needs the imperfect 'avevo/ero', or a different past where another compound tense needs its specific auxiliary tense.
proposed_misconceptions.cross_kind_note: Cross-tense: also the trapassato remoto (avevo for ebbi). Distinct from avere_for_essere (which is the essere/avere choice).
proposed_misconceptions.rationale: Third auxiliary_choice specific: which FORM of the auxiliary, not which auxiliary.

reuses_existing.note: the bucket also notes 'wrong auxiliary' (essere/avere choice).
ero andato for a feminine subject (andata).
